headlines.title: NASA’s Hubble Spies Stellar Sparkler for July 4th
headlines.summary: Red, white, and blue stars glitter like a sparkler being waved on a dark night in this new image from NASA’s Hubble Space Telescope.

headlines.title: NASA’s Hubble Captures Crimson Cloud Sparkling with White, Blue Stars
headlines.summary: Blue and white stars shine brightly against crimson gas in this image from NASA’s Hubble Space Telescope.
